attempts.insight: erw is required because the rewrites are under definitional unfolding; sequencing matters (unit_map_one first, then restrictScalars_η twice)

next_steps: Instance is permanent reusable infrastructure (blueprint lem:restrictscalars_laxmonoidal). But it does NOT unblock tensorObj_restrict_iso (see that milestone). Add \lean pin (done by review) and let sync_leanok mark it next iter.

findings.blocker: The iter-207 plan premise — that the sectionwise restrictScalars lax instance is the SOLE remaining project-side ingredient — was DISPROVEN. Two structural blockers: (1) the scheme module ring presheaf is RingCat-valued (no monoidal structure there), and the δ-route residual lands at that layer via Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom, whereas tensorObj uses the CommRingCat-valued X.presheaf — the δ-route and tensorObj live at different ring layers; (2) at the CommRingCat level, pushforward φ (codomain F.op ⋙ ?R) and restrictScalarsLaxMonoidal (?S ⋙ forget₂) cannot be composed by instance resolution — a ⋙-vs-forget₂ associativity mismatch.

attempts.strategy: δ-route: comparison map = δ of (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction φ).leftAdjointOplaxMonoidal, with hypothesis (pushforward φ).LaxMonoidal
attempts.lean_error: inferInstance for MonoidalCategory (PresheafOfModules ((sheafToPresheaf _).obj Y.ringCatSheaf)) FAILS — no monoidal structure on RingCat-valued PresheafOfModules
attempts.insight: BLOCKER 1: f.toRingCatSheafHom.hom is RingCat-valued; the residual after restrictFunctorIsoPullback + sheafificationCompPullback lands at PresheafOfModules.pullback f.toRingCatSheafHom.hom (RingCat level), where (pushforward φ).LaxMonoidal cannot even be STATED

attempts.strategy: build a CommRingCat-level pushforwardLaxMonoidal instance composing pushforward₀ Monoidal with restrictScalarsLaxMonoidal via Functor.LaxMonoidal.comp
attempts.code_tried: instance pushforwardLaxMonoidal ... := ... (composition of pushforward₀OfCommRingCat monoidal with restrictScalars lax)
attempts.lean_error: Application type mismatch: argument φ has type Sc ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat ⟶ (F.op ⋙ Rc) ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat but is expected to have type ?m ⟶ Functor.op ?m ⋙ ?m
attempts.insight: BLOCKER 2: pushforward φ wants F.op outermost; restrictScalarsLaxMonoidal wants forget₂ outermost; associativity of ⋙ vs forget₂ gives no syntactic match. Instance removed — no dead code, no new sorry.

next_steps: DO NOT re-dispatch as 'one instance away'. Structural re-route required (planner decision): (a) restructure Steps 1-2 to stay at the X.presheaf CommRingCat layer, then bridge to sheafification at the end; (b) add line-bundle hypotheses (hM hN) to tensorObj_restrict_iso (NOT protected; consumer tensorObj_isLocallyTrivial has them in scope) and prove sectionwise via Scheme.Modules.Hom.isIso_iff_isIso_app with free-rank-one trivialisations; (c) build a CommRingCat-level (pullback φ).Monoidal then take its μ/δ iso — still needs the RingCat↔CommRingCat bridge of (a).
